name: Uranium Sector
summary: Day 73-74 (Mon-Tue). **URA $57.23 (+3.7% 1D, +12.3% 1M, +10.6% 3M) — THE CLEANEST DECOUPLED LONG OF THE CYCLE.** Whereas gold trades inversely with real yields (capped), and Brent has explicit Goldman-vs-JPM-$25 disagreement, uranium gets BOTH the war/HEU geopolitics premium AND the AI-power-demand secular bid — there is NO analogous overhead supply; uranium contract market is structurally undersupplied through 2028. **B2 IRAN'S MAY 10-11 COUNTER-PROPOSAL CONTAINED THE FIRST HEU CONCESSION OF THE CYCLE: dilute portion of stockpile under IAEA supervision + transfer remainder to third country — but with EXPLICIT RETURN CLAUSE demanding HEU returnability if US exits any future deal.** Trump has publicly discussed 'seizing' Iran's enriched-uranium stockpile in prior weeks; Iranian concession-with-return-clause is the precise structural counter. Russia's standing offer (Putin May 9) implicit third-country candidate — never publicly named. **THE NUCLEAR FILE IS NOW THE CENTRAL DIPLOMATIC AXIS OF THE CYCLE — markets pricing nuclear-energy-security premium as durable.** US Trump-admin equity-investment-in-mining policy (loans, offtake agreements, supply-chain reshoring) accelerates secular bid. URA monthly trajectory: +12.3% 1M / +10.6% 3M — outperforming both gold (-0.7% 1M) and oil (+6.3% 1M). **REVERSIBILITY LOW: even a full Iran ceasefire would NOT reverse uranium — secular AI bid persists. This is closer to a 'buy and hold' than a 'reverse on ceasefire' trade.** Crisis-linked %: ~85% (HEU concession + Trump 'seizing' rhetoric); secular ~15% (AI-data-center demand from Microsoft/Amazon/Meta nuclear PPAs). Cameco (~24% of URA), Kazatomprom proxy bid stays strong. JPost-style 'Tehran give away enriched uranium' framing now operative.

active_triggers.condition: Confirmed US/Israeli kinetic action on Iran nuclear-enrichment facility (Natanz, Fordow, Arak)
URA breaks $62 sustained for 3 sessions (above 1M peak +25% from baseline)
Russia formally named as HEU custodian for Iran transfer under any framework agreement within 30 days (by 2026-06-11)
active_triggers.note: Iran's May 10-11 counter-proposal contained first HEU concession (dilute portion under IAEA + transfer remainder to third country, with explicit return clause). Russia's standing offer is implicit candidate. If formally named, uranium-sector + russia + nuclear-program all rerate.

recent_signals.headline: URA +7.5% TO $58.26 — DUAL BENEFICIARY OF MOU HEU-CUSTODIAN PATH AND STRUCTURAL AI POWER DEMAND. 14-point MOU requires Iran to ship out HEU stockpile (Russia rejected by US; alternatives IAEA, Kazakhstan). Nuclear fuel cycle legitimization signal — civilian uranium custody/processing infrastructure becomes more politically valuable. Cameco 24% of URA up sharply. URA +117% TTM — supply-squeeze narrative undisturbed by oil-crash regime. ~50% crisis (custodian) / ~50% structural (AI). Does NOT reverse cleanly on either MOU path.
recent_signals.verification: CONFIRMED URA price tape (+7.5% multi-source); MOU HEU provision = REPORTED multi-corroborated (custodian undefined); Russia-as-custodian rejected by US = CONFIRMED Russia-side, sidelined as primary mediator

historical_summaries.summary: 3 signals. URA +7 | AI-structural component (~55% per markets | URA -2
